'''鈭歠-zh-r''' ('''fazhara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:net|net]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:net|net]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| fazhara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazharithi|fazharithi]] || [[word:fazhariji|fazhariji]] || [[word:fazharishi|fazharishi]] || [[word:fazhari|fazhari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazharuthuth|fazharuthuth]] || [[word:fazharujuj|fazharujuj]] || [[word:fazharushush|fazharushush]] || [[word:fazhar|fazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazharuthu|fazharuthu]] || [[word:fazharuju|fazharuju]] || [[word:fazharushu|fazharushu]] || [[word:fazharu|fazharu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazharufuth|fazharufuth]] || [[word:fazharufuj|fazharufuj]] || [[word:fazharufush|fazharufush]] || [[word:fazharuf|fazharuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazharethe|fazharethe]] || [[word:fazhareje|fazhareje]] || [[word:fazhareshe|fazhareshe]] || [[word:fazhare|fazhare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazharothoth|fazharothoth]] || [[word:fazharojoj|fazharojoj]] || [[word:fazharoshosh|fazharoshosh]] || [[word:fazhar|fazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazharotho|fazharotho]] || [[word:fazharojo|fazharojo]] || [[word:fazharosho|fazharosho]] || [[word:fazharo|fazharo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazharofoth|fazharofoth]] || [[word:fazharofoj|fazharofoj]] || [[word:fazharofosh|fazharofosh]] || [[word:fazharof|fazharof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhar忙th忙|fazhar忙th忙]] || [[word:fazhar忙j忙|fazhar忙j忙]] || [[word:fazhar忙sh忙|fazhar忙sh忙]] || [[word:fazhar忙|fazhar忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazharathath|fazharathath]] || [[word:fazharajaj|fazharajaj]] || [[word:fazharashash|fazharashash]] || [[word:fazhar|fazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazharatha|fazharatha]] || [[word:fazharaja|fazharaja]] || [[word:fazharasha|fazharasha]] || [[word:fazhara|fazhara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazharafath|fazharafath]] || [[word:fazharafaj|fazharafaj]] || [[word:fazharafash|fazharafash]] || [[word:fazharaf|fazharaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fazharasha|fazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofazharasha|gofazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifazharasha|gokifazharasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fazharn眉sha|fazharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofazharnkn眉sha|gofazharnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifazharn眉sha|gokifazharn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fazharsh毛sha|fazharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofazharnksh毛sha|gofazharnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifazharsh毛sha|gokifazharsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazharosha|fazharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazharnkrosha|gofazharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazharosha|gokifazharosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fazharmusha|fazharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazharnkmusha|gofazharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazharmusha|gokifazharmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fazharsherasha|fazharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofazharnksherasha|gofazharnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifazharsherasha|gokifazharsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fazharngasha|fazharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofazharnkngasha|gofazharnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifazharngasha|gokifazharngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fazharyasha|fazharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofazharnkyasha|gofazharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifazharyasha|gokifazharyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fazharyamasha|fazharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofazharnkyamasha|gofazharnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifazharyamasha|gokifazharyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazharn眉sh毛sha|fazharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazharnkn眉sh毛sha|gofazharnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazharn眉sh毛sha|gokifazharn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazharn眉rosha|fazharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazharnkn眉rosha|gofazharnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazharn眉rosha|gokifazharn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazharn眉musha|fazharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazharnkn眉musha|gofazharnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazharn眉musha|gokifazharn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazharsh毛n眉sha|fazharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazharnksh毛n眉sha|gofazharnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazharsh毛n眉sha|gokifazharsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazharsh毛rosha|fazharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazharnksh毛rosha|gofazharnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazharsh毛rosha|gokifazharsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazharsh毛musha|fazharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazharnksh毛musha|gofazharnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazharsh毛musha|gokifazharsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazharon眉sha|fazharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazharnkron眉sha|gofazharnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazharon眉sha|gokifazharon眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazharosh毛sha|fazharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazharnkrosh毛sha|gofazharnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazharosh毛sha|gokifazharosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fazharomusha|fazharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofazharnkromusha|gofazharnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifazharomusha|gokifazharomusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fazharmun眉sha|fazharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofazharnkmun眉sha|gofazharnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifazharmun眉sha|gokifazharmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fazharmush毛sha|fazharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofazharnkmush毛sha|gofazharnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifazharmush毛sha|gokifazharmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fazharmurosha|fazharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofazharnkmurosha|gofazharnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifazharmurosha|gokifazharmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fazhar|fazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙zh忙r|f忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofazhar|hofazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙zh忙r|hof忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofazhar|hohofazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙zh忙r|hohof忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fazhar|n眉fazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙zh忙r|n眉f忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fazhar|n眉n眉fazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙zh忙r|n眉n眉f忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fazhar|n茂fazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙zh忙r|n茂f忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fazhar|n茂n茂fazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙zh忙r|n茂n茂f忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufazhar|lufazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙zh忙r|luf忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufazhar|lulufazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙zh忙r|luluf忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifazhar|lifazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙zh忙r|lif忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifazhar|lilifazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙zh忙r|lilif忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofazhar|kofazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙zh忙r|kof忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofazhar|kokofazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙zh忙r|kokof忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefazhar|kefazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙zh忙r|kef忙zh忙r]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefazhar|kekefazhar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙zh忙r|kekef忙zh忙r]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
